reviews.review_description: Wish there was a way to make the step sequencer longer in the  free version.  Trying to make a loop on the pads. And it doesn’t work out right.  When does the full version come out for quest ?

developer_response.body:
Hey stormshadow612, great to hear you're enjoying the app, come chat on our discord if you have more ideas.
You can change the step sequencer length up to 32 bars in the info popup (point and click the 'i' to open the settings.

[Dev update, the full version is now live]

reviews.review_description:
I love this app I have the full release on Steam when I saw a lite version in store for Quest 2 I had to get it .
I loose time and get totally sucked into this it's amazing well worth getting .

There is so many things to make music with. The layout is organized and there are cool little things that you can do such as having different backgrounds to play your music in. If I were to nitpick on having something is that I think the design could be a little sleeker but otherwise it's great!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Lavender :) Always open to feedback about the App, come join our discord to discuss.
